description: The healing agent tried to verify its own fix and was denied permission to execute anything, so the independent rubric re-run in the outer loop was the only judge of whether the patch worked. The maker-checker separation that Anthropic recommends was not something I prompted for. It fell out of the loop's structure. That is the whole point of loop engineering: the guarantees live in the harness, not in the model's good intentions.
title: Now what exactly is loop engineering? And where do Anthropic's Fable 5 model and web scraping fit in?
